name: Glordon
description:
This time, I’m the 2rd* person doing this character, unfortunately. . .

Anyway... Glordon, is a little creature you found after you tried to run from the cell Grigon (Glordon’s dad) put you in, and you 2 could maybe be friends or something, idk.

I would really like your review on this character, and you could tell me if there’s something to modify in this character, cuz it would be hella useful. :)

Also, thanks to @ItzVaderboy for suggesting this character, it's thanks to him that you guys get to enjoy this new character of mine. :)
creator: Areschlucht
